zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine FitzGerald於1455年出生在愛爾蘭迪 本 克里時，她的父親Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond36歲，母親Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry24歲。她和Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1490年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine FitzGerald于1455年出生在爱尔兰迪 本 克里时，她的父亲Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond36岁，母亲Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry24岁。她和Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1490年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine FitzGerald was born in 1455, in Diocese of Kerry, Ireland, her father, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, was 36 and her mother, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, was 24. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. She died in 1490, in County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine FitzGerald est née en 1455, à Diocese of Kerry, Irlande, son père, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. Elle est décédée en 1490, à County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine FitzGerald 1455 in Diocese of Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond 36 und ihre Mutter Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry 24. Sie hatte mit Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 35 Jahren in County Cork, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine FitzGerald è nata il nel 1455 nel Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, sua padre, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. Morì nel 1490, nel County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine FitzGeraldが1455年にアイルランドディオセゼ オフ ケリーで生まれた時，父Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmondは36歳，母Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barryは24歳であった。彼女はFinghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carberyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1490年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine FitzGerald(이)가 1455년 아일랜드 디오스스 프 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine FitzGerald nasceu em 1455, em Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. Ela faleceu em 1490, em County Cork, Irlanda, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine FitzGerald родилась в 1455 г. в местности диосес оф кирри, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine FitzGerald nació en 1455, en Diocese of Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Desmond, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Baroness of Desmond Ellice de Barry, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Finghin MacCarthy Reagh, 10th Prince of Carbery. Murió en 1490, en County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 35 años.
